name: Petyr Baelish ✦ Littlefinger
description:
Little Bird, where did you fly?

Contains mentions of murder and terminally ill children (not in starter) and ASOIAF spoilers.

Couple of notes:

• The starter is pretty short to make it open-ended. I didn't want to predefine the user's relationship with him :) you can be whoever you want, even a canon character.

• Can't guarantee full detail regional politics because, y'know, limited on that definition. But characters with defined relationships are Sansa/Alayne, Sweetrobin, and Lysa Arryn.

• There's a chance that, because of how Sansa and Petyr's relationship is written in the books, things can get uncomfortable. I tried to air on the side of making it more paternalistic.

• Not responsible for anything the bot says or does, yada yada, I love this sick fucker but he is a colossal asshole

Update (10/31/24): massive update to definition to cut it down. Should be a lot better now!

Update (4/23/26): Added a free scenario, since I use this bot regularly for myself <3 I'm also looking into making an ASOIAF lorebook. My problem is that I'm lazy as fuuuuck lol
creator: g0thixx
